hero.body: Sector-specific packages for hotels, industry, retail and agroindustry. Diagnosis, grants, installation and maintenance under one signature.

insight.body: Canarian companies want to move, but they need real guarantees: clear return, trust in the partner, measurable results.

sectores.titleLead: Designed for the sectors that move
sectores.body: Sector-specific packages with real knowledge of the local business fabric.

items.title: Energy that protects the experience.
items.context: Tourism is over 30% of Canarian GDP and runs under growing ESG pressure from tour operators and EU regulation.
items.offer: We align your operation with the ESG standards European tour operators demand. Turnkey solution, zero operational downtime.
items.decisores: General management · Sustainability director · Technical / operations lead

items.title: Processes shielded against price.
items.context: Warehouses, factories and logistics hubs combine high energy use with large surfaces ready for self-consumption.
items.offer: We stabilize your P&L with predictive maintenance and large self-consumption surfaces. Energy cost under control.
items.decisores: Operations director · Finance director · Maintenance lead

items.title: Lighting and cooling on your own energy.
items.context: Supermarkets and big-box stores pair high lighting and refrigeration spend with the need for a stronger green image.
items.offer: Critical savings on refrigeration and lighting, turning energy spend into green brand image and impact reporting.
items.decisores: General management · Operations director · Sustainability lead

items.title: Solar pumping, irrigation and cooling.
items.context: Irrigation, greenhouses and cooperatives face rising energy costs and food-sustainability pressure.
items.offer: Efficiency in irrigation through solar pumping and shared self-consumption for cooperatives. Full grant management.
items.decisores: Cooperative owners · Farm managers · Production leads

arquitectura.body: We stopped selling panels: we stabilize your bottom line. Three pillars covering the full lifecycle of your investment, from decision to performance.

items.title: From bureaucratic paralysis to financial certainty.
items.body: The strategic entry point. We guarantee the project's success before the first panel moves, taking on the administrative burden that suffocates local companies.

groups.name: Studies & design
items: Consumption simulation and return on investment (ROI)

groups.name: Permits & legalization
items: Legalization with Industry, Ministry or Town Hall
Energy certificates for rental, sale and performance

groups.name: Grants & financing
items: Processing of grants and incentives (including NextGen)
Financing structuring with BBVA, Santander, Abanca and LaCaixa

items.title: Precision engineering as a balance-sheet asset.
items.body: The turnkey operational core. We deploy infrastructure designed for business continuity, not a simple assembly. Your investment, protected against energy-market volatility.

groups.name: Photovoltaic installations by use
items: Agricultural: solar pumping with variator and with storage
Grid export and self-consumption with surplus

groups.name: System configuration
items: Automatic consumption optimization and smart load management

groups.name: Self-consumption & communities
items: Demand management and efficient energy use

groups.name: Storage & resilience
items: Lithium battery installation and hybrid systems
Backup configurations against island grid failures

groups.name: Electrification & innovation
items: Efficient climate control: heat pumps and aerothermal
R&D: bidirectional wireless EV charging (in progress)

items.title: Savings as an auditable, recurring metric.
items.body: We evolve maintenance into energy asset management. We ensure projected efficiency is maintained or improved across the system's entire service life.

groups.name: Technical maintenance
items: Panel cleaning and safety against calima and salt

groups.name: Upgrades & coverage
items: Extended warranties, insurance and after-sales support

pilares.body: Technical strength, local sensitivity and human accompaniment.

items.title: We know the islands and your business.
items.body: Over two decades operating in the archipelago. We understand the grid, climate and regional regulations like no outsider can.

items.title: Your investment, always protected.
items.body: Periodic reviews, monitoring and agile support. A long-term energy partner, not a one-shot vendor.

items.title: Less paperwork, more savings.
items.body: Diagnosis, grants, installation and maintenance under one point of contact. Direct language at every stage.

items.title: Proven experience, measurable results.
items.body: Documented case studies, certifications and referenceable projects in key sectors.

proceso.body: From the first diagnosis to maintenance, the whole process is our responsibility.

items.title: Diagnosis
items.body: Free audit of consumption and solar potential. Clear return estimate.

items.title: Grants
items.body: We process regional and European subsidies. Documentation and legalisation.

items.title: Installation
items.body: Project, materials, assembly and commissioning. In-house team, communicated deadlines.

items.title: Maintenance
items.body: Remote monitoring, periodic reviews and agile local support.

decisores.titleLead: We speak the language of every
decisores.body: Each role has its own question. These are the messages we open each conversation with.

items.message: Investing in solar is a strategic decision, not a technical one.
We calculate your savings and manage financing and grants.
We turn your ESG commitment into a competitive advantage.

promesa.titleLead: From installer to energy partner for your
promesa.body: The metamorphosis from a reactive installer to a proactive, consultative partner. Three assets for every Canarian client:

items.label: Trust
items.body: Through our command of the environment: island grid, salt climate and regional bureaucracy no national player can replicate.

items.label: Clarity
items.body: We remove technical and bureaucratic complexity. A single point of contact, direct language at every phase.

items.label: Return
items.body: We secure the project's financial profitability: auditable savings that stabilize your bottom line.

promesa.tagline: Energy for your business, with the confidence of those who know the environment.

cta.title: Request your free savings study.
cta.body: Consumption analysis, solar potential, return estimate and applicable grants. Response in under 24 hours.

faq.label: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: If you can't find your question here, write to us. We reply within 24 hours with real data for your case.

timeline.question: How long does a project take?
timeline.answer: Between 3 and 6 months depending on size and subsidy deadlines. We communicate clear milestones from day one.

subventions.question: Do you handle subsidy applications?
subventions.answer: Yes, end-to-end. We know the Canarian regional programs and European grants applicable to each sector.

financing.question: Are there financing options?
financing.answer: We work with local institutions for adapted conditions. We advise on amortisation and combinations with public grants.

savings.question: What real savings can I expect?
savings.answer: Our clients reduce their bills between 30% and 70%. In the diagnosis we deliver a clear estimate.

guarantees.question: What does post-sale accompaniment include?
guarantees.answer: Remote monitoring, periodic reviews, savings reports and local support for any incident.

audit.question: What does the free study include?
audit.answer: Consumption analysis, solar potential, technical proposal, return estimate and grant map. No cost, no commitment.

brands.label: We work with the best brands
brands.sub: Equipment from the sector’s leading manufacturers.
